calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Continued To May-30-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

William P. Klein, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Aldo Caric, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Robert Valencia, dba Bay Area Equipment.
Default entered against defendant on December 3, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed today, April 1, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Aldo Caric, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Robert Valencia, dba Bay Area Equipment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $81.00.
Costs $235.00, for a total of $3,316.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Continued To Apr-04-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
